The Shedim are not afraid of us.
There is no power short of Adonai which can hold them.
The Utukku are safe behind the veil.
Their Kings celebrate our suffering in the hidden lands.
The Rabisu know they can feed upon us and live forever.
The Jinn know their power and revel in it.
dusty rocks?
The littlest sound, it is.
The Shedim are made of smoke and fire and their world is the same.
millennia we fought our primitive fights.
Even now we barely live.
invisible places where we cannot see.
and only then, will the joke finally end.
years in the dirt.
I could tell you of children who followed.
share the anguish and outrage that plagued my soul, but no.
laughter can.
Hawwa will speak the word soon, and... you'll see!
heart will fill your throats and you too will be Sara, then.
stars.
Laugh at the dogs in their costumes.
Hah!
phrases were memorized and repeated as we do with scripture today.

We provide a number of outdoor stages or hire services.
Covered in stages are essential if your event is outside, given the weather we have!
We can meet you at the location the stage is to go and we can assess the site, discuss your needs and find a solution that works for you.
Our outdoor stage can come with audio and lighting or you can supply your own.
We also offer crowd safety barriers (also known as mojo barriers).
We supply our trailer stage options all over the country for many types of events.
We have sizes to choose from depending on your budget and the nature of your event.
Performance area is m x .m, and for bigger events you can add on the extended PA wings giving you a m stage frontage.
These are ideal for larger events and ideal for branding.
We can also offer drum kit and keyboard risers with all our stages.
If you are a performer or band who likes to interact with their audience, we can provide a ramp going into the crowd.
Just ask for details.
We have a wide range of outdoor stage hire & crowd control solutions available.
However, with every turnkey product and as every event hire is different, sometimes flexible staging solutions are required.
Our stage platforms give you complete flexibility in your choice of stage size and height.
Choose an open air or a covered option, single level or tiered option with wheelchair ramps.
Stage & Lighting can build your outdoor stage design!
m² stage area with various height ground support.
The newest edition to the family!
This provides the ideal solution for various applications.
Ideal for small street concerts where set up time is restricted, street festivals, community events and as a VIP viewing platform.

Close on the heels of Prime Minister Sh Narendra Modi's Swachh Bharat Abhiyaan, the Gian Sagar College and Hospital scrubbed clean village Fatehpur Garhi on outskirts of Rajpura under its Swasth Bharat Abhiyaan.Chairman and Senior Oncologist Dr. Barjinder Singh of the institute said that the keeping in view the unhygienic conditions prevalent in village,s the college decided to adopt this village, involve its people and clean the village that has population of people.“The village comes under village adoption scheme of the Gian Sagar Medical College and Hospital.
Under this a team of eight doctors of various specialties visited door-to-door for the OPD’s of the villagers residing in the village.
The referred patients were provided free bus service, along with the discount on their procedures and investigations and as well as pharmacy, which extended up to discounts,” he said.
Having completed the free medical services as a part of its adoption scheme, the team of Gian Sagar Medical College and Hospital thereafter took up the gargantuan task of cleaning and tidying up the village.
General Manager, Marketing Natasha Chopra added when team reached the village, surroundings and sewer system was in pathetic state.
“Village’s pits were full of polybags, waste lay strewn and there were bushes along the road.
The drains overflowed with sewer water, which formed puddles on road.
In absence of proper bins for dumping garbage, the waste was strewn around in the village," she said.
Teams were pided and places were allotted, so that the teams can work efficiently and effectively.
For this a team eleven members were sent to the village.
After all the formalities and authorities taken from the sarpanch of the village, the team started its two days task of cleaning the whole village from one corner to another.Time to time villagers were given knowledge about cleanliness, about cleaning the places, keeping the roads clean.
A meeting was organized with sarpanch in order to clarify people about importance of maintaining hygiene.
Lectures on waste management shall be organized from time to time for the villagers as a part of orientation.Along with the villagers, team from Gian Sagar Medical College worked hard, devoting their time and drained off their sweat Drains were cleaned, big piles of garbage were taken off to the places where all the garbage was thrown Gian Sagar shall also be providing garbage bins to the village, so that the villagers throw all the trash into the bins.
He added that instiute aims at adopting more villages in similar way.
